rustbound_pilgrim.gimmick: charges a delayed overhead hit that inflicts scorch
rustbound_pilgrim.counterplay: guard the charge, then punish with break

ivy_strangler.gimmick: applies snare and punishes attacking the same target repeatedly
ivy_strangler.counterplay: swap targets or burst it with ash

flood_acolyte.gimmick: spreads soak to enable ally combos
flood_acolyte.counterplay: focus it early or punish with spark

switchblade_drone.gimmick: multi-hit attacks gain damage against soaked targets

veil_leech.gimmick: drains guard and hides behind a small barrier
veil_leech.counterplay: use halo reveal and burst it

lamp_witness.gimmick: cleanses ally statuses and applies reveal to the party

toll_knight.gimmick: large delayed bell swings; gains guard if chipped too lightly
toll_knight.counterplay: use heavy break and punish after the full swing

root_jury.gimmick: taunts and locks one ally with bramble roots
root_jury.counterplay: ash damage removes roots and opens the team

canal_seraph.gimmick: stays airborne and becomes vulnerable only after spark hits or parries

static_chorister.gimmick: chains jolt through the whole party if multiple allies are soaked
static_chorister.counterplay: cleanse soak or burst it before it sings

archive_shade.gimmick: copies the last player posture and gains a related buff
archive_shade.counterplay: bait a weak posture, then burst

glass_hound.gimmick: marks the lowest_guard ally and gains bonus crit on pounce
glass_hound.counterplay: protect weak allies and parry the leap
